# pdnd_client_keys (Data Source)

Lists all public keys (JWKs) associated with a PDND client.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pdnd_client_keys" "example" {
  client_id = "cc0e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440040"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_id` (String) Client UUID

### Read-Only

- `keys` (Attributes List) List of client keys (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys))

<a id="nestedatt--keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys`

Read-Only:

- `alg` (String)
- `kid` (String)
- `kty` (String)
- `use` (String)
